Export.Routine: DVPFM1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FileMan Wrapper Utility Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****;October 1, 2015;Build 35 ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; LIST^DIC 2051 ; UPDATE^DIE 2053 ; WP^DIE 2053 ; GETS^DIQ 2056 Q ; ;--------- Private Methods used only by Digital Veterans Platform ---------- ; GETS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Wrapper for FileMan GETS^DIQ Database Server API N ERRRES,SUCCESS,FILE,IENS,FIELDS,FLAGS S ERRRES=$NA(^TMP($J,"DVP","ERRRES")) K @ERRRES N X F X="FILE","IENS","FIELDS","FLAGS" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; Verify that FILE exists S SUCCESS=$$VFILE^DVPUTL(FILE,TARGET) Q:'+SUCCESS $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; Verify that IENS exists I IENS="" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Missing IENS parameter","GETS^DVPL1") Q DVPERR ; Verify that FIELD is valid I FIELDS]"" S SUCCESS=$$VFIELD^DVPUTL(FILE,FIELDS,"**",TARGET) Q:'+SUCCESS $$RESULT^DVPUTL() I FIELDS="" S FIELDS="**" ; Verify that FLAGS is valid I FLAGS]"" S SUCCESS=$$VFLAGS^DVPUTL("EINRZ",FLAGS,TARGET) Q:'+SUCCESS $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; If FLAGS are null, set to default I FLAGS="" S FLAGS="ENR" ; Make sure the IENS is properly formatted I $E(IENS,$L(IENS))'="," S IENS=IENS_"," ; Call the FileMan GETS^DIQ API and check for Error Condition D GETS^DIQ(FILE,IENS,FIELDS,FLAGS,RESULTS,ERRRES) ; If an error occured, get the error code and text from the results and build error node I $D(@ERRRES) D ERROR^DVPUTL(ERRRES,"$$GETS^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; Parse the data in the RESULTS array and convert names to camelCase format D GETS^DVPUTL(RESULTS,TARGET) Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; LIST(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Wrapper for FileMan LIST^DIC Lister API N ERRRES,SUCCESS,FILE,IENS,FIELDS,FLAGS,NUMBER,FROM,PART,INDEX,SCREEN,ID,X S ERRRES=$NA(^TMP($J,"DVP","ERRRES")) K @ERRRES N X F X="FILE","IENS","FIELDS","FLAGS","NUMBER","FROM","PART","INDEX","SCREEN","ID" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; Make sure PART is in upper case S PART=$$UP^XLFSTR(PART) ; Verify that FILE exists S SUCCESS=$$VFILE^DVPUTL(FILE,TARGET) Q:'+SUCCESS $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; Verify that FIELD is valid I FIELDS="" S SUCCESS=$$VFIELD^DVPUTL(FILE,FIELDS,"@IXIFIDIIXEFIDEWID-",TARGET) Q:'+SUCCESS $$RESULT^DVPUTL() I FIELDS="" S FIELDS="@;.01;FID" ; Verify that FLAGS is valid I FLAGS]"" S SUCCESS=$$VFLAGS^DVPUTL("BIKPMQU",FLAGS,TARGET) Q:'+SUCCESS $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; If FLAGS are null, set to default I FLAGS="" S FLAGS="P" ; Call the FileMan LIST^DIC API and check for Error Condition D LIST^DIC(FILE,IENS,FIELDS,FLAGS,NUMBER,FROM,PART,INDEX,SCREEN,ID,RESULTS,ERRRES) ; If an error occured, get the error code and text from the results and build error node I $D(@ERRRES) D ERROR^DVPUTL(RESULTS,"$$LIST^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; Parse the data in the RESULTS array and convert it to a suitable format D LIST^DVPUTL(FILE,RESULTS,TARGET) Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; UPDATE(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Wrapper for FileMan UPDATE^DIE Lister API N ERR,IEN,IENS,FDA,MSG,RES N X F X="FLAGS","FDA","IEN" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; RPCMETA(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Wrapper for RPC Metatdata N ERR,IEN,IENS,MSIG,PNUM,RES,MSG,RPC N X F X="RPC" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) I RPC']"" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"The RPC is required in order to look up an RPC.","RPCMETA^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() I $D(^XWB(8994,RPC)) S IEN=RPC E S IEN=$O(^XWB(8994,"B",RPC,0)) I 'IEN D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"RPC "_RPC_" is not a valid RPC.","RPCMETA^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; Build the output data S IENS=IEN_"," D GETS^DIQ(8994,IENS,"**","E","RES","MSG") S @TARGET@("results","name")=RES(8994,IENS,.01,"E") I RES(8994,IENS,.03,"E")']"" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"RPC ROUTINE is undefined.","RPCMETA^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() I RES(8994,IENS,.02,"E")']"" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"RPC TAG is undefined.") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() S @TARGET@("results","tag")=RES(8994,IENS,.02,"E") S @TARGET@("results","routine")=RES(8994,IENS,.03,"E") S MSIG=$$MTHDSIG^DVPUTL(RES(8994,IENS,.03,"E"),RES(8994,IENS,.02,"E")) I MSIG="" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Method Signature for TAG "_RES(8994,IENS,.02,"E")_" in ROUTINE "_RES(8994,IENS,.03,"E")_" is not valid.","RPCMETA^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() S @TARGET@("results","methodSignature")=$P(MSIG,"(")_"^"_RES(8994,IENS,.03,"E")_"("_$P(MSIG,"(",2) S @TARGET@("results","returnType")=RES(8994,IENS,.04,"E") S @TARGET@("results","availability")=RES(8994,IENS,.05,"E") S @TARGET@("results","inactive")=RES(8994,IENS,.06,"E") S @TARGET@("results","clientManager")=RES(8994,IENS,.07,"E") S @TARGET@("results","wordWrapOn")=RES(8994,IENS,.08,"E") S @TARGET@("results","version")=RES(8994,IENS,.09,"E") S @TARGET@("results","appProxyAllowed")=RES(8994,IENS,.11,"E") S @TARGET@("results","description")="" I RES(8994,IENS,1,"E")]"" M @TARGET@("results","description")=@RES(8994,IENS,1,"E") K @TARGET@("results","description","E") S @TARGET@("results","returnParameterDescription")="" I RES(8994,IENS,3,"E")]"" M @TARGET@("results","returnParameterDescription")=@RES(8994,IENS,3,"E") K @TARGET@("results","returnParameterDescription","E") ; Initialize input parameters to zero if none exist I $L(MSIG,",")<2 D . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter")=0 . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",0,"name")="" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",0,"parameterType")="" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",0,"maxDataLength")="" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",0,"required")="" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",0,"description")="" ; Set the Input Parameters based on the Method Signature, not what's defined in the RPC file N I,CNT,X,PARAM S CNT=0 F I=2:1 S X=$P($P($P(MSIG," "),")"),",",I) Q:X="" S CNT=CNT+1,PARAM(CNT)=X N I,Y,FOUND F I=1:1:CNT S Y=PARAM(I) Q:Y="" D . S FOUND=0 . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter")=I . N J,X S X="" F J=1:1:CNT S X=$O(RES(8994.02,X)) Q:X=""!(FOUND) D . . ; If the Sequence Numbers or Input Parameter Names match then use this one . . I ($G(RES(8994.02,X,.05,"E"))=I)!($G(RES(8994.02,X,.01,"E"))=PARAM(I)) D . . . S FOUND=1 . . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"name")=PARAM(I) . . . I $G(RES(8994.02,X,.01,"E"))'=PARAM(I) D . . . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"flag")="Suspicious: RPC Input Parameter Name - Variable Name mismatch" . . . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"RPCInputParamName")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.01,"E")) . . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"parameterType")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.02,"E")) . . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"maxDataLength")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.03,"E")) . . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"required")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.04,"E")) . . . I $G(RES(8994.02,X,1,"E"))]"" M @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"description")=@RES(8994.02,X,1,"E") K @TARGET@("results",I,"description","E") . . Q:FOUND . . I $D(@TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"name")) Q . . ; If no exact match found just default to what is in the RPC file . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"flag")="Suspicious: RPC Input Parameter Name - Variable Name mismatch" . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"name")=PARAM(I) . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"RPCInputParamName")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.01,"E")) . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"parameterType")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.02,"E")) . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"maxDataLength")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.03,"E")) . . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"required")=$G(RES(8994.02,X,.04,"E")) . . I $G(RES(8994.02,X,1,"E"))]"" M @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"description")=@RES(8994.02,X,1,"E") K @TARGET@("results",I,"description","E") . . S FOUND=1 . Q:FOUND . ; If nothing defined for this parameter just add it with empty values . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",J,"flag")="Suspicious: Missing RPC Input Parameter definition in REMOTE PROCEDURE file" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"name")=PARAM(I) . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"parameterType")="" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"maxDataLength")="" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"required")="" . S @TARGET@("results","inputParameter",I,"description")="" Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; FUNCTION(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Execute an external function and return the output N ERR,FUNC,RES,METHSIG,MSIG,CALL,DVPDATA,ROUTINE,ENTRY,SPEC,NEWPARMS S ERR="" N X F X="ROUTINE","ENTRY" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) N METHSIG,MSIG S MSIG=$$MTHDSIG^DVPUTL(ROUTINE,ENTRY) I MSIG="" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Method Signature "_ENTRY_"^"_ROUTINE_" does not exist.","FUNCTION^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() I MSIG'["(" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Method Signature "_ENTRY_"^"_ROUTINE_" is not a Function.","FUNCTION^DVPL1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; Need to handle the case for no input params S METHSIG=ENTRY_"^"_ROUTINE_"()" ; Parse the PARAMS global and build params for method signature S IGNORE="ENTRY,ROUTINE," D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS) S SPEC("ENTRY,")="",SPEC("ROUTINE,")="",NEWPARMS=$$REPLACE^XLFSTR(PARAMS,.SPEC) I $G(NEWPARMS)]"" S METHSIG=ENTRY_"^"_ROUTINE_"("_$G(NEWPARMS)_")" ; Create the Function Call and execute it S CALL="S RES=$$"_METHSIG X CALL S @TARGET@("results","result")=RES Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL()
